body:
## Sprint ID + Objective
- Sprint: `S05`
- Objective: Implement a single sandboxed command executor + receipts engine (GUI-first) with deterministic redaction and stable normalized hashing.

## What this PR does
- Adds `engine/command_executor.ts` with deny-by-default command allowlist, argument token checks, path/cwd allowlist enforcement, timeout handling, deterministic redaction, and normalized hash computation.
- Adds `engine/command_executor.test.ts` with AT-S05-01/02/03 coverage.
- Updates `package.json` test unit command to run the S05 test suite.
- Adds S05 docs and durable evidence bundle under `docs/sprints/S05/evidence/`.

## Command + Path Allowlist Model
- Command allowlist: `git`, `gh`, `npm`, `node`, `bash`.
- Argument policy: strict token pattern plus explicit unsafe-token blocks (`..`, `~`) and path-token checks.
- Path/cwd policy: only allow paths rooted in repo root + `docs/sprints/S05/evidence` + `/tmp/promptops/S05`.

## Whitelist + Scope/Budget Notes
- Prompt whitelist initially covered docs/tooling paths; ownership proof found no existing executor module and engine is the core-logic boundary.
- Scope extension used for this sprint: `engine/command_executor.ts`, `engine/command_executor.test.ts`.
- Ownership evidence: `docs/sprints/S05/evidence/ownership_scope_proof.md`.
- Maintainability evidence: `docs/sprints/S05/evidence/maintainability_receipts.md`.

## Acceptance Tests
- [x] AT-S05-01 Disallowed command/path blocked with clear error + recorded receipt.
- [x] AT-S05-02 Allowed command receipts include stdout/stderr/exit code.
- [x] AT-S05-03 Same command twice yields stable normalized hash with separate non-normalized artifacts.

## Evidence Paths
- `docs/sprints/S05/evidence/EVD-S05-01_receipts_samples.jsonl`
- `docs/sprints/S05/evidence/EVD-S05-02_whitelist_violation_proofs.jsonl`
- `docs/sprints/S05/evidence/AT-S05-01_receipts.md`
- `docs/sprints/S05/evidence/AT-S05-02_receipts.md`
- `docs/sprints/S05/evidence/AT-S05-03_receipts.md`
- `docs/sprints/S05/evidence/gates_receipts.md`
- `docs/sprints/S05/evidence/stoplight_greps.md`
- `docs/sprints/S05/evidence/scope_proof.md`

## Redaction + Normalization Rules Used For Hashing
- Deterministic redaction patterns for common token formats (GitHub token families, bearer tokens, cloud key formats).
- Sensitive env values are redacted from receipt text when env key matches sensitive-name patterns.
- Normalized hash view strips or normalizes ephemeral data (timestamps, temp paths, pid fragments) while raw/non-normalized artifacts are retained as separate files.

## How to Verify
```bash
npm -s run verify
bash gates.sh
node --test --experimental-transform-types engine/command_executor.test.ts
```

## What is intentionally not changed
- No new network endpoints/routes.
- No new third-party dependencies.
- No merge performed; this PR is for review/approval.
title: [S05] security : command executor + receipts engine
